claims.check: old user labels 04/05 resolve to stable sessions pumped-skill and 18, with product source paths
claims.threshold: two historical stable session identities and paths present in immutable rollout telemetry

claims.check: pumped-skill remains live and session 18 is absent
claims.threshold: pumped-skill has-session exit 0 and exact session 18 has-session exit 1
claims.replay: tmux has-session -t '=18'; tmux has-session -t '=pumped-skill'; tmux display-message -p -t %30 '#{session_name} #{session_id} #{window_id} #{pane_id}'

claims.check: the pumped-skill source worktree contains no uncommitted work
claims.threshold: porcelain empty; cached diff exit 0; worktree diff exit 0
claims.replay: git -C .claude/worktrees/pumped-fn-skill status --porcelain=v1 --untracked-files=all; git -C .claude/worktrees/pumped-fn-skill diff --cached --quiet; git -C .claude/worktrees/pumped-fn-skill diff --quiet

claims.check: the remaining pumped-skill pane's current main checkout has no uncommitted product paths
claims.threshold: non-.okra status count == 0; cached diff exit 0; worktree diff exit 0
claims.source_of_truth: live pane metadata plus Git status
claims.replay: tmux display-message -p -t %30 '#{pane_current_path}'; git status --short --untracked-files=all | awk '$2 !~ /^\.okra\// {n++} END {print n+0}'; git diff --cached --quiet; git diff --quiet

claims.check: all six product files from the pumped-skill source are present unchanged on synchronized main
claims.threshold: source skill tree == main skill tree; mismatch count 0; HEAD == origin/main
claims.source_of_truth: Git objects and independent unit-manifest worker record
claims.replay: git merge-base --is-ancestor a732c339d081d6810e7f616a888528f17f1997e4 HEAD && git diff --quiet 0ec0efff HEAD -- skills/pumped-fn && test "$(git rev-parse 0ec0efff:skills/pumped-fn)" = "$(git rev-parse HEAD:skills/pumped-fn)" && test "$(git rev-parse HEAD)" = "$(git rev-parse origin/main)"

claims.check: the remaining product pane has no foreground worker or child process and its scrollback is captured
claims.threshold: pane command zsh; process group contains only shell; pane not dead; capture line count > 0
claims.source_of_truth: live tmux pane and process table
claims.replay: tmux display-message -p -t %30 '#{pane_current_command} #{pane_pid} #{pane_dead}'; ps -o pid=,ppid=,stat=,cmd= --forest -g "$(ps -o sid= -p 3496667 | tr -d ' ')"; tmux capture-pane -p -J -S - -t %30 | sha256sum

claims.check: stopping pumped-skill after explicit human acknowledgement would lose no uncommitted product work
claims.threshold: uncommitted product path count 0; source clean; six-file payload preserved; no active child; capture present
claims.replay: git -C .claude/worktrees/pumped-fn-skill status --porcelain=v1 --untracked-files=all; git status --short --untracked-files=all | awk '$2 !~ /^\.okra\// {n++} END {exit n!=0}'; git diff --quiet 0ec0efff HEAD -- skills/pumped-fn; ps -o pid= --ppid 3496667 | sed '/^$/d' | test "$(wc -l)" -eq 0

claims.check: explicit human acknowledgement authorizes tmux shutdown now
claims.source_of_truth: orchestrator packet human_confirmation_boundary and current governed records

claims.check: the main-integration run store verifies before cleanup eligibility

proposed_kill_target.condition: only after explicit human acknowledgement and a fresh held integrity gate
